note: The official Bachelor of Communication Programme page requires 9 units of School Core Courses: COMM1015 and COMM2035 plus one of COMM2026, COMM2027 and COMM2036. The Game Design and Animation Major page publishes 67 units of Major Courses: all 20 Major Required Courses for 46 units, all three 3-unit courses from either the Advanced Animation Stream or the Advanced Game Design Stream, and 12 units selected from the explicit 38-course Major Elective pool. The four Practicum courses are explicitly 0 unit. FILM4016 Internship is also explicitly 0 unit and therefore does not contribute to the 12-unit Major Elective requirement. Both 3-unit Honours Project courses are separately required for 6 units. The Programme table titles GAME1006 'Transcultural Studies of Game'; the linked individual official course page supplies the title 'Transcultural Studies of Games' used here. University Language, General Education and Free Electives are excluded. No Year or Term is assigned because the official requirement tables do not publish course timing.
